reviews.review_description:
I joined in and the music was so loud with no way to turn it off, not that the music was bad it was just THERE but besides that the game seems like it could have a future even though it’s not playable right now I tried to press the button to enter a lobby and nothing happens. 

Ps: no sound effects?? 


I also reviewed the game for yt so check it out @coco3brits on yt
